pipeline_policy.claim_boundary: Document controls are local proof only; hosted upload, AI, and storage readiness require security/privacy review.

pipeline_stages.control: PDF-only intake with user notice and local rate-limit policy
Allowlisted PDF extension and content-type policy
PDF magic-byte and EOF checks through bounded parser
Generated quarantine names instead of direct user filenames
No direct file serving from quarantine paths
Malware scan is required before real customer-file handling
Native text extraction first; OCR requires explicit approval and cost gate
Document type detection from text and filename signals
Extracted field rows with provenance and confidence
Parser confidence score and field confidence labels
All user-facing extracted fields require confirmation before packet use
Each document becomes a bounded EvidenceItem-style record
Sensitive field categories are named before AI or sharing
AI is optional, labeled, policy-bound, and unable to open gates
Reports carry draft/review/final watermarks and blocked-claim sections
